title: Harris 102011003 Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Paint Brush 1.5in
features: 1.5in Seriously Good Walls and Ceilings paint brush, with guaranteed no bristle loss due to our patented No-Loss technology.
Great for cutting in around plug sockets, light switches and other areas
These brushes have been designed specifically for use with emulsion paints thanks to a specialised blend of synthetic filaments
A flexible, easy grip handle provides comfort over extended decorating sessions
For best results, rinse brush lightly in water before use to remove any dust
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Paint Brush 1.5in Contains 1 x Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Paint Brush 1.5in After care After use with water based paints, such as emulsion, remove the excess paint and wash in warm soapy water, or rinse in clean running water or cleaning fluids. Then immediately dry thoroughly. *Bristle loss may occur if left to soak or in a damp area. For use when cutting in around light switches, plug sockets and other interior areas when using masking tape These paint brushes have been specifically designed and engineered to give you seriously good results when painting walls and ceilings with emulsion paint. No Bristle Loss* For use with all emulsion paints. Suggested use For use when cutting in around light switches, plug sockets and other interior areas when using masking tape. For best results, rinse brush head before use to remove any dust. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort. Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier
